embeds.title: Abuse or lose: a deranged midgame goldfish’ take on Pollux
embeds.description: Abuse or lose: a deranged midgame goldfish’ take on Pollux   Before I start, let me note a few things. This guide is a simple breakdown of a character, intended for casual players with a trivial grasp on the game’s basic terms and mechanics.  The guide is completely F2P-friendly; I won’t be sayin...
